name: Anne Reihman
title: Attending Physician, Interventional Pulmonology
bio: Dr. Anne Reihman grew up in Indiana. She received her medical degree from Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine. She completed her internal medicine residency training at Duke University followed by her pulmonary and critical care fellowship and interventional pulmonary training at the University of Colorado.
education: Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine
